# Enhanced stitching: Handles custom commands beyond just exec

# Regular exec command
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# Custom mcpdiff command (without exec)
mcpdiff trace1.json trace2.json

# MCP tool commands
mcp-spy -- mcpdiff file1 file2
mcp-test -- go run ./test/main.go

# Server commands that start long-running processes
mcp-server-start myserver go run ./cmd/server/main.go
mcp-serve -- python mcp_server.py

# Commands that interact with existing servers
mcp-server-send myserver {"method":"test"}
mcp-server-stop myserver

# Enhanced stitcher handles all these cases:
# - exec commands (standard)
# - Custom MCP commands that execute programs
# - Server commands that start processes
# - Commands that manage existing processes
